Requirement Text: Limit system access to authorized users, processes, and devices
Limit system access to authorized transactions and functions
Control CUI flow per approved authorizations
Separate duties to reduce risk of malevolent activity
Employ least privilege for security functions and privileged accounts
Use non-privileged accounts for nonsecurity functions
Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions
Provide privacy and security notices consistent with CUI rules
Use session lock with pattern-hiding displays
Terminate user sessions after defined conditions
Monitor and control remote access sessions
Route remote access via managed access control points
Authorize wireless access prior to connection
Protect wireless access using authentication and encryption
Verify and control/limit external system connections
Limit portable storage on external systems
Control CUI on publicly accessible systems
Security awareness for managers, admins, and users
Protect audit information from unauthorized access
Limit audit management to privileged users
Track, review, approve/disapprove, and log changes
Temporary password change on first login
Limit media access to authorized users
Encrypt CUI on portable media during transport
Protect systems during terminations and transfers
Limit physical access to authorized individuals
Safeguard CUI at alternate work sites
